infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: This app uses your calendar to help you schedule match-related events.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: This app uses your reminders to notify you about upcoming events.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera to let you take photos for your profile.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app needs access to your microphone for recording voice messages.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to find matches nearby.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photos to let you choose a profile picture.
